content: You have a way of pulling my soul out to the light of day. Ten years ago, The Venus Project (TVP is much easier) had a guy whose name I forget staying on-site with Jacque and Roxanne at the compound near Venus, Florida who developed an amazing monthly magazine which was published every month on TVPs website. If you can track any of those publications down I'd be grateful. I remember them fondly because he was very adept at embedding links to whatever material he happened to be dealing with.
